summary: This release introduces an interactive user feedback system for empty search results and a refreshed Chat UI aligned with Palo Alto Networks XSIAM design standards.

entries.title: Interactive feedback for empty search results
entries.description: When the assistant cannot find relevant documentation for a query, a new opt-in feedback form appears. Users can review, edit, or redact their original query before submitting it to help administrators bridge documentation gaps.

entries.title: Refreshed Chat UI matching XSIAM styling
entries.description: The user interface now aligns with the official XSIAM design, featuring fully mapped dark and light modes, refreshed icons, and a loading animation that reflects search progress.

entries.title: Improved connection reliability under heavy load
entries.description: Interrupted search sessions and empty responses during periods of high traffic are now significantly less likely.
